nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: We needed to explore the mines and to find the cause of the explosions.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: We found this very reason pretty quickly - somepony had planted a lot of dynamite in the mines.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Dynamite sticks were hung on the walls like a garland.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I had a revolver with me, but I had to be careful not to hit it and blow myself up.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: That's about how I would have died if I hadn't been careful with the dynamite.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Any careless shot could trigger an explosion.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Which, of course, wasn't there, because I was careful.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: That's about how I would have died if I'd let the rats eat me.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: But of course I wouldn't let them do it.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: And then the most unpleasant thing happened.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Chucky, my partner, told me, quote:

nodes.speaker: chakky
nodes.text: Sheriff, something might happen in town while we're out here.

nodes.speaker: chakky
nodes.text: I have to go back to the city and keep order.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: And she just walked away and left me alone!

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I didn't even have time to say anything!

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: What a horror…

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I was left alone in total darkness, surrounded by rats.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: But I had to keep going, no matter what.

nodes.speaker: chakky
nodes.text: Sheriff, I have to go back to the city and keep order.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: …And then I was left alone.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: At last, I got to the end of this shaft with an incredible effort of will.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I've never enjoyed the sun like I did back then.
